prompt: Edit image 1: Change the main panel background color to the shade from image 4. Insert the star shape from image 3 as an important marker next to the 'Graphs widgets' title. Update the text color within the 'Log' panel to the blue color from image 2.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Change the background color of the large left panel (titled 'ImgGui Demo') to the shade from image 4. Insert the star shape from image 3 immediately to the right of the 'Graphs widgets' title, functioning as an important marker. Update the text color of the log messages within the 'Example: Log' panel to the vibrant blue color from image 2.
objects: Large left panel (titled 'ImgGui Demo') with a new background color from image 4
Star shape from image 3, immediately to the right of the 'Graphs widgets' title
Log messages within the 'Example: Log' panel with vibrant blue text color from image 2
Graph widgets (lines, histograms, waveforms) within the 'ImgGui Demo' panel
GUI controls (sliders, listbox, color pickers) within the 'ImgGui Demo' panel
Text labels and input fields within the 'Example: Property editor' panel
Primitive shapes within the 'Example: Custom rendering' panel
